description: Vertical poster combining a photograph and a collage of news headlines. The top half is a low-light photograph of a welder at work, wearing a 'LINCOLN ELECTRIC' welding helmet and a teal shirt, leaning over a metal workpiece with sparks and glow reflected on the visor. Across the center in serif type is the text 'Securing American' in italic over 'DOMINANCE' in large bold capitals, on a dark blue gradient. The lower half shows three torn-paper-style news headlines from outlets with visible logos: 'ROOFING CONTRACTOR, Labor Department Invests $86 Million in Workforce Training'; 'KTAR NEWS 92.3 FM, Maricopa County receives $1.5M grant for manufacturing workforce training'; and 'HR DIVE, DOL to provide $30M in training grants on AI, skilled trades.'
notable_text: Securing American DOMINANCE; Labor Department Invests $86 Million in Workforce Training; Maricopa County receives $1.5M grant for manufacturing workforce training; DOL to provide $30M in training grants on AI, skilled trades
